{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260322035823122102EDCA1B51877774"}"},"total":135},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7292220430907032339","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"写的不错，有些结局太快了，刚给人到高潮的部分突然来个结局，刚刚还在感动突然没了[捂脸][捂脸][捂脸][捂脸][捂脸]"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1697854036,"group_id":"7218172178334747704","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"看遍天下所有事，欲写无数的故事","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N7kN1iW8pEErRYsPE1HqOZt/BYEFr2UMetPLkhq3L1+A","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/1437c63bc45b464bb1cc6cd6a7b0d4f1~tplv-1yzifmftcy-expand:200:0:0.png","user_id":"1319055097605175","user_name":"喊我小祖宗就行"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"1319055097605175","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7218172178334747704","book_info":{"abstract":"【本书字数庞大，连载很久，最开始的风格确实是玛丽苏到作者本人都不忍直视的程度。但是后期就稳定发挥了，如果有厌蠢症的建议跳过前一千多章的部分。】
在被系统选中的那一刻，慕小乔的内心是拒绝的，而且是一万个不想答应。
你说她死了就死了吧，还非得给她绑定一个万人迷系统，只要积攒足够的魅力值，她就有机会可以复活。
复活？？？
呵呵，慕小乔听到这个词的时候，只想冷笑，然后潇洒的把这个所谓的绑定系统合约给扔到一边。
复活卷轴这种东西，她不需要，她只想安静的做一个美美的尸体。
她慕小乔美了一辈子，即便是死了，那也是一代美人，红颜祸水的传说。
可抗议和拒绝都是无效的，系统的笑比她还冷。
“呵呵，你以为你能拒绝吗？”
拒绝无效，于是慕小乔只能忍辱负重，享受着每天为男主扛各种炸药包的生活。
刺客暗杀，她挡！！！
奸细下毒，她喝！！！
反派偷袭，她挨！！！
什么，还有绿茶白莲花想来抢人？
她可是茶艺派的创始人，还有谁会比她更茶，不服来比一比！
任务完成了，她要离开了，然鹅有人不答应了。
“你撩了我，就必须负责。”
慕小乔：？？？
少爷你傻了吧，你见过海王负责的吗？？？
负责，说笑呢！","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/a2a3d75b6f0cabc3cfcb618766cc652e~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"欢颜 609","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"其实这本书整体来讲挺好看的，但是"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1691755545,"group_id":"7218172178334747704","service_id":13,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"2465532086856126"}},"expand":{"book_id":"7218172178334747704","book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"0","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"4.613615e+06"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"8","score_suffix_text":"阅读1小时后追评"},"stat":{"digg_count":0,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":4613,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":0},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"comment_id":"7228784906524295974","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"我觉得这些剧情还都不错，就是感觉某一些世界后面的剧情完全没有，一下子就完结了，给人感觉好突然，有点儿猝不及防，还有几个小世界感觉就是把原女主的戏份全都移给了慕小乔，也就是现女主。加油，作者大大！对了，还有一个想问的就是长月烬明完了之后还更新吗？","text_exts":[{"e":113,"s":109,"text":"长月烬明","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E9%95%BF%E6%9C%88%E7%83%AC%E6%98%8E&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%23177412310351877774%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227228784906524295974%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227218172178334747704%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E9%95%BF%E6%9C%88%E7%83%AC%E6%98%8E%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1683082772,"group_id":"7218172178334747704","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"陷于永昼","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2NwI6ZTagCz/vITqiC0R8/M73Q33WK2yg68TC8li90sdV","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/f8aba9452267
